pages.title: Solar retail Centre
pages.content: This image shows a modern retail centre with a fully operational rooftop solar system installed by Lightpath. The project demonstrates how landlords can generate rental income and reduce operational costs through our zero-capex solar solutions.
pages.excerpt: Commercial shopping centre powered by a rooftop solar installation by Lightpath Property Solutions.

pages.title: Lightpath
pages.content:
for Commercial Properties

Lightpath Property Solutions offers zero-capex commercial solar solutions that reduce energy costs, boost property income, and increase asset value. All fully funded and professionally managed. Get a Quote Talk to Us

Our Commitment to Sustainable Energy

Lightpath Property Solutions is dedicated to delivering innovative, fully funded solar energy solutions that help property owners reduce costs, increase property value, and contribute to a greener future. With a proven track record and trusted partners, we manage every detail from project funding to maintenance, ensuring hassle-free, high-impact results. 0 kWh Join us in transforming the future of energy. Our team is committed to providing sustainable solutions that empower property owners and support South Africa's green initiatives. 0 kWh Partner with Lightpath Property Solutions for reliable, cost-effective solar energy systems tailored to your property needs. 0 kWh Discover how our solar solutions can increase your property's value and generate passive income through roof rental models. 0 kWh Our expertise spans large-scale installations for shopping centres, office parks, and industrial properties, backed by experienced financial and technical partners.
Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs)
Install solar with zero upfront costs, paying only for the energy consumed. Enjoy immediate savings and long-term price stability.
Cash Purchase Systems
Gain full ownership and control over your energy production. Ideal for long-term asset value and energy independence for your property.
Roof Rental Models
Earn passive income by leasing unused roof space for solar installations. No upfront costs or operational responsibilities for property owners.
Custom Solar Solutions
We tailor solar solutions to meet your specific energy needs. Contact us to explore how we can optimize your property's energy efficiency.
Lower Energy Bills
Reduce your operational costs with our solar solutions. Enjoy significant savings on your monthly energy bills and improve your bottom line.
Increased Property Value
Boost your property's market value with sustainable energy solutions. Attract tenants and investors who prioritize eco-friendly and energy-efficient buildings.
Passive Income Generation
Earn passive income by leasing your unused roof space for solar installations. A hassle-free way to generate revenue without any operational responsibilities.
Sustainable Business Practices
Demonstrate your commitment to sustainability and reduce your carbon footprint. Appeal to environmentally conscious customers and enhance your brand reputation.
Latest News

Recent Successes

Delivering Impactful Solar Solutions Across South Africa

At Lightpath, we turn vision into value. Our recent projects demonstrate our ability to deliver high-performance, fully funded solar solutions that reduce energy costs, enhance property value, and support long-term sustainability goals. From hybrid systems with battery backup to rooftop solar installations under our roof rental model, each success reflects our commitment to engineering excellence, financial innovation, and reliable partnerships.

Featured Project- Hilton Siding Retail Centre
  • CommercialSolar
  • EnergyIndependence
  • SolarForProperty
View All Projects

Lightpath Property Solutions, in partnership with Meridian Energy, successfully delivered a flagship hybrid solar and battery project at the Hilton Siding Shopping Centre in Hilton, KwaZulu-Natal. Designed for high performance and long-term energy security, this project reflects Lightpath’s ability to engineer and implement sophisticated clean energy solutions for the commercial property sector.

The installation features 720 Tier 1 Jinko 550W solar panels, delivering 396 kWp DC, and three 150 kW hybrid inverters, providing a combined 450 kW AC output. In addition, the system includes two containerised battery units with integrated HVAC systems, offering 1.2 MWh of high-voltage energy storage to enhance grid resilience and reduce diesel reliance.

With an estimated Year 1 solar yield of 528,200 kWh and generator displacement savings of over 438,000 kWh annually, the system delivers immediate operational and financial benefits. The solution was delivered as a fully engineered, insured, and grid-compliant turnkey EPC project, valued at R13.98 million.

From a financial standpoint, the system offers compelling returns, with an internal rate of return (IRR) of 35.26%, a net present value (NPV) of R48.4 million, and a payback period of under three years. 

By significantly lowering diesel costs, stabilizing energy tariffs, and contributing to the shopping Centre’s carbon reduction goals, the Hilton Siding project stands as a powerful example of Lightpath’s commitment to delivering sustainable energy with measurable commercial returns.

 

 

 

 

Powering Sustainability Through Partnership

Lightpath Property Solutions, in partnership with GreenYellow South Africa, successfully delivered a landmark hybrid solar energy solution at the Hilton Siding Shopping Centre in KwaZulu-Natal. This strategic collaboration combined Lightpath’s commercial property expertise with GreenYellow’s international renewable energy capabilities to deliver a high-performance, future-ready energy system.

The project includes a 432 kWp rooftop solar installation and a 916 kWh battery storage unit, designed to reduce grid dependency, cut diesel usage, and ensure continuous operations during outages. The system was implemented under Lightpath’s roof rental model, allowing the landlord to monetise previously unused rooftop space while Lightpath manages installation, operation, and maintenance.

This partnership is a powerful example of how clean energy infrastructure can unlock new value for commercial properties — delivering sustainability, resilience, and rental income without capital expenditure.

  • RoofRentalSolar
  • SustainablePartnership
  • CleanEnergyForProperty
See Details
Pipeline & Upcoming Projects

Exciting Growth Ahead — Stay Tuned

Lightpath Property Solutions is actively engaged in multiple high-potential commercial solar projects across South Africa. In collaboration with our strategic financial and technical partners, we are currently progressing a strong pipeline of prospects, ranging from retail centres and industrial parks to office complexes.

These projects are in advanced stages of feasibility, funding, and engineering review — with several set to be secured and announced in the coming weeks.

We are committed to expanding our footprint and delivering impactful energy solutions that benefit landlords, tenants, and the environment alike.

Watch this space — more success stories are coming soon.

  • CleanEnergyInProgress
  • WatchThisSpace
  • SolarPipeline
Learn More
Meet Our Experts

Join Our Team

Discover the talented professionals behind our success. Learn More
Kenny Setzin

Director 

A Seasoned dealmaker with nearly 30 years of experience spanning mergers and acquisitions, telecommunications, media, and finance. He leads deal origination, structuring, capital raising, and post-investment value creation. Previously, he served as an executive director at New Africa Investments Limited (Nail), a JSE-listed company with a R10 billion market cap, where he played key roles in restructuring and strategy. His background includes senior roles at Nedbank and Telkom, with academic credentials including a BA and MBA from U.S. universities and further studies in small business financing in Taiwan.

Linkedin Twitter
Frederick Kluckow

Director 

A serial entrepreneur and the founder of Lightpath Property Solutions. With a diverse track record spanning industries such as mining, property development, hospitality, and fintech, he brings a unique blend of operational insight and strategic execution to every venture. His passion for scalable, sustainable infrastructure led to the formation of Lightpath — a company focused on helping commercial property owners unlock long-term value through fully funded solar energy solutions. Frederick is known for his hands-on leadership style, commercial acumen, and commitment to building businesses that deliver both financial performance and lasting impact.

Linkedin Twitter
???
Business Development ManagerJack drives client relations and project acquisitions, expanding Lightpath’s footprint across South Africa. Linkedin Twitter
???
Finance & Operations LeadLina manages financial planning and operational efficiency, ensuring seamless project delivery. Linkedin Twitter

Email Us

Reach out to us via email at info@lightpathproperty.com for inquiries about our solar solutions, project consultations, or partnership opportunities.

Call Us

Our dedicated team is available at +27 11 123 4567 to discuss your energy needs, provide quotes, or answer any questions about our solar projects.

Visit Us

Find us at 123 Solar Street, Rosebank, Johannesburg, 2196. We welcome visits from clients and partners interested in our solar energy solutions.

Learn More

Proudly Part of the DIH Group of Companies

Lightpath Property Solutions forms part of the DIH Group, a respected investment and holdings company with a proven track record across energy, infrastructure, and strategic assets. As a member of this group, Lightpath benefits from solid leadership, depth at board level, and the financial and operational strength required to deliver scalable, fully funded solar solutions to South Africa’s commercial property sector.

  • Advantage 1: Strong Leadership
  • Advantage 2: Financial Strength & Credibility
  • Advantage 3: Proven Track Record
Meet Our Experts

Meet Our Team

Discover the talented professionals behind our success. Learn More
Kenny Setzin

Director 

A Seasoned dealmaker with nearly 30 years of experience spanning mergers and acquisitions, telecommunications, media, and finance. He leads deal origination, structuring, capital raising, and post-investment value creation. Previously, he served as an executive director at New Africa Investments Limited (Nail), a JSE-listed company with a R10 billion market cap, where he played key roles in restructuring and strategy. His background includes senior roles at Nedbank and Telkom, with academic credentials including a BA and MBA from U.S. universities and further studies in small business financing in Taiwan.

Linkedin Twitter
Carl Kluckow

Director 

A serial entrepreneur and the founder of Lightpath Property Solutions. With a diverse track record spanning industries such as mining, property development, hospitality, and fintech, he brings a unique blend of operational insight and strategic execution to every venture. His passion for scalable, sustainable infrastructure led to the formation of Lightpath — a company focused on helping commercial property owners unlock long-term value through fully funded solar energy solutions. Frederick is known for his hands-on leadership style, commercial acumen, and commitment to building businesses that deliver both financial performance and lasting impact.

Linkedin Twitter
Jack Radebe

Director

A seasoned executive with over 20 years of leadership experience across telecommunications, financial services, and investment management. He has held senior roles at leading organisations including Vodacom, WesBank, and MTNSP, where he successfully scaled operations from product to multi-departmental oversight. As Group CEO of Sihold, Jack led the group and its subsidiaries, driving transformative, industry-shaping initiatives. He has served in multiple C-suite positions and on various boards. Jack holds a BSc from Wits University, a PDM in Business Administration from Wits Business School, and an MBA from the University of Wales.

Linkedin Twitter
Derrick Ngomane

General Manager

As General Manager of Lightpath Property Solutions, Derrick Ngomane oversees the day-to-day operations, project coordination, and team performance across all active and pipeline solar projects. He plays a key role in ensuring operational efficiency, quality control, and client satisfaction while supporting the execution of strategic objectives across the business.

Derrick is responsible for managing supplier relationships, coordinating with technical partners, monitoring project timelines, and ensuring compliance with health, safety, and regulatory standards. His role also includes overseeing on-site logistics, workforce planning, and financial reporting support in alignment with project goals.

With a hands-on leadership style and strong attention to detail, Derrick ensures that Lightpath continues to deliver reliable, fully funded energy solutions that meet the needs of commercial property clients across South Africa.

Linkedin Twitter

Email Us

Reach out to us via email at info@lightpathproperty.com for inquiries about our solar solutions, project consultations, or partnership opportunities.

Call Us

Our dedicated team is available at +27 66 143 9477 to discuss your energy needs, provide quotes, or answer any questions about our solar projects.

Visit Us

Find us at DIH Offices 20 Georgian Crescent Bryanston East, Johannesburg, 2191 We welcome visits from clients and partners interested in our solar energy solutions.

pages.title: Sample Page
pages.content:
This is an example page. It's different from a blog post because it will stay in one place and will show up in your site navigation (in most themes). Most people start with an About page that introduces them to potential site visitors. It might say something like this:

Hi there! I'm a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my website. I live in Los Angeles, have a great dog named Jack, and I like piña coladas. (And gettin' caught in the rain.)

...or something like this:

The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.

As a new WordPress user, you should go to your dashboard to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!

pages.title: Privacy Policy
pages.content:
Who we are

Suggested text: Our website address is: https://lightpath.10web.cloud.

Comments

Suggested text: When visitors leave comments on the site we collect the data shown in the comments form, and also the visitor’s IP address and browser user agent string to help spam detection.

An anonymized string created from your email address (also called a hash) may be provided to the Gravatar service to see if you are using it. The Gravatar service privacy policy is available here: https://automattic.com/privacy/. After approval of your comment, your profile picture is visible to the public in the context of your comment.

Media

Suggested text: If you upload images to the website, you should avoid uploading images with embedded location data (EXIF GPS) included. Visitors to the website can download and extract any location data from images on the website.

Cookies

Suggested text: If you leave a comment on our site you may opt-in to saving your name, email address and website in cookies. These are for your convenience so that you do not have to fill in your details again when you leave another comment. These cookies will last for one year.

If you visit our login page, we will set a temporary cookie to determine if your browser accepts cookies. This cookie contains no personal data and is discarded when you close your browser.

When you log in, we will also set up several cookies to save your login information and your screen display choices. Login cookies last for two days, and screen options cookies last for a year. If you select "Remember Me", your login will persist for two weeks. If you log out of your account, the login cookies will be removed.

If you edit or publish an article, an additional cookie will be saved in your browser. This cookie includes no personal data and simply indicates the post ID of the article you just edited. It expires after 1 day.

Embedded content from other websites

Suggested text: Articles on this site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website.

These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracking your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.

Who we share your data with

Suggested text: If you request a password reset, your IP address will be included in the reset email.

How long we retain your data

Suggested text: If you leave a comment, the comment and its metadata are retained indefinitely. This is so we can recognize and approve any follow-up comments automatically instead of holding them in a moderation queue.

For users that register on our website (if any), we also store the personal information they provide in their user profile. All users can see, edit, or delete their personal information at any time (except they cannot change their username). Website administrators can also see and edit that information.

What rights you have over your data

Suggested text: If you have an account on this site, or have left comments, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you, including any data you have provided to us. You can also request that we erase any personal data we hold about you. This does not include any data we are obliged to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes.

Where your data is sent

Suggested text: Visitor comments may be checked through an automated spam detection service.

At Lightpath, we turn vision into value. Our recent projects demonstrate our ability to deliver high-performance, fully funded solar solutions that reduce energy costs, enhance property value, and support long-term sustainability goals. From hybrid systems with battery backup to rooftop solar installations under our roof rental model, each success reflects our commitment to engineering excellence, financial innovation, and reliable partnerships.

Featured Project- Hilton Siding Retail Centre
  • CommercialSolar
  • EnergyIndependence
  • SolarForProperty
View All Projects

Lightpath Property Solutions, in partnership with Meridian Energy, successfully delivered a flagship hybrid solar and battery project at the Hilton Siding Shopping Centre in Hilton, KwaZulu-Natal. Designed for high performance and long-term energy security, this project reflects Lightpath’s ability to engineer and implement sophisticated clean energy solutions for the commercial property sector.

The installation features 720 Tier 1 Jinko 550W solar panels, delivering 396 kWp DC, and three 150 kW hybrid inverters, providing a combined 450 kW AC output. In addition, the system includes two containerised battery units with integrated HVAC systems, offering 1.2 MWh of high-voltage energy storage to enhance grid resilience and reduce diesel reliance.

With an estimated Year 1 solar yield of 528,200 kWh and generator displacement savings of over 438,000 kWh annually, the system delivers immediate operational and financial benefits. The solution was delivered as a fully engineered, insured, and grid-compliant turnkey EPC project, valued at R13.98 million.

From a financial standpoint, the system offers compelling returns, with an internal rate of return (IRR) of 35.26%, a net present value (NPV) of R48.4 million, and a payback period of under three years. 

By significantly lowering diesel costs, stabilizing energy tariffs, and contributing to the shopping Centre’s carbon reduction goals, the Hilton Siding project stands as a powerful example of Lightpath’s commitment to delivering sustainable energy with measurable commercial returns.

Powering Sustainability Through Strategic Partnerships

Lightpath Property Solutions, in partnership with GreenYellow South Africa, successfully delivered a landmark hybrid solar energy solution at the Hilton Siding Shopping Centre in KwaZulu-Natal. This strategic collaboration combined Lightpath’s commercial property expertise with GreenYellow’s international renewable energy capabilities to deliver a high-performance, future-ready energy system.

The project includes a 432 kWp rooftop solar installation and a 916 kWh battery storage unit, designed to reduce grid dependency, cut diesel usage, and ensure continuous operations during outages. The system was implemented under Lightpath’s roof rental model, allowing the landlord to monetise previously unused rooftop space while Lightpath manages installation, operation, and maintenance.

This partnership is a powerful example of how clean energy infrastructure can unlock new value for commercial properties — delivering sustainability, resilience, and rental income without capital expenditure.

  • RoofRentalSolar
  • SustainablePartnership
  • CleanEnergyForProperty
See Details
Pipeline & Upcoming Projects

Exciting Growth Ahead — Stay Tuned

Lightpath Property Solutions is actively engaged in multiple high-potential commercial solar projects across South Africa. In collaboration with our strategic financial and technical partners, we are currently progressing a strong pipeline of prospects, ranging from retail centres and industrial parks to office complexes.

These projects are in advanced stages of feasibility, funding, and engineering review — with several set to be secured and announced in the coming weeks.

We are committed to expanding our footprint and delivering impactful energy solutions that benefit landlords, tenants, and the environment alike.

Watch this space — more success stories are coming soon.

Learn More

Proudly Part of the DIH Group of Companies

Lightpath Property Solutions forms part of the DIH Group, a respected investment and holdings company with a proven track record across energy, infrastructure, and strategic assets. As a member of this group, Lightpath benefits from solid leadership, depth at board level, and the financial and operational strength required to deliver scalable, fully funded solar solutions to South Africa’s commercial property sector.

  • Advantage 1: Strong Leadership
  • Advantage 2: Financial Strength & Credibility
  • Advantage 3: Proven Track Record
Meet Our Experts

Meet Our Team

Discover the talented professionals behind our success. Learn More
Kenny Setzin

Director 

A Seasoned dealmaker with nearly 30 years of experience spanning mergers and acquisitions, telecommunications, media, and finance. He leads deal origination, structuring, capital raising, and post-investment value creation. Previously, he served as an executive director at New Africa Investments Limited (Nail), a JSE-listed company with a R10 billion market cap, where he played key roles in restructuring and strategy. His background includes senior roles at Nedbank and Telkom, with academic credentials including a BA and MBA from U.S. universities and further studies in small business financing in Taiwan.

Linkedin Twitter
Carl Kluckow

Director 

A serial entrepreneur and the founder of Lightpath Property Solutions. With a diverse track record spanning industries such as mining, property development, hospitality, and fintech, he brings a unique blend of operational insight and strategic execution to every venture. His passion for scalable, sustainable infrastructure led to the formation of Lightpath — a company focused on helping commercial property owners unlock long-term value through fully funded solar energy solutions. Frederick is known for his hands-on leadership style, commercial acumen, and commitment to building businesses that deliver both financial performance and lasting impact.

Linkedin Twitter
Jack Radebe

Director

A seasoned executive with over 20 years of leadership experience across telecommunications, financial services, and investment management. He has held senior roles at leading organisations including Vodacom, WesBank, and MTNSP, where he successfully scaled operations from product to multi-departmental oversight. As Group CEO of Sihold, Jack led the group and its subsidiaries, driving transformative, industry-shaping initiatives. He has served in multiple C-suite positions and on various boards. Jack holds a BSc from Wits University, a PDM in Business Administration from Wits Business School, and an MBA from the University of Wales.

Linkedin Twitter
Derrick Ngomane

General Manager

As General Manager of Lightpath Property Solutions, Derrick Ngomane oversees the day-to-day operations, project coordination, and team performance across all active and pipeline solar projects. He plays a key role in ensuring operational efficiency, quality control, and client satisfaction while supporting the execution of strategic objectives across the business.

Derrick is responsible for managing supplier relationships, coordinating with technical partners, monitoring project timelines, and ensuring compliance with health, safety, and regulatory standards. His role also includes overseeing on-site logistics, workforce planning, and financial reporting support in alignment with project goals.

With a hands-on leadership style and strong attention to detail, Derrick ensures that Lightpath continues to deliver reliable, fully funded energy solutions that meet the needs of commercial property clients across South Africa.

pages.title: Services
pages.content:
Unlock with Power Purchase Agreements

Lightpath's Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) offer a seamless transition to solar energy with zero upfront investment. You only pay for the electricity you consume, at a rate typically lower than your current utility costs. Enjoy predictable energy expenses and contribute to a greener future.
  • No Upfront Costs: Eliminates initial investment barriers.
  • Reduced Energy Bills: Lower electricity rates compared to traditional utilities.
  • Long-Term Stability: Predictable energy costs for years to come.
Full Ownership

Invest in Solar Independence

With a cash purchase system from Lightpath, you gain complete ownership of your solar installation. This means you're in control of your energy production and consumption, leading to long-term savings and increased property value. Unlike PPAs, you own the asset outright and benefit from all the energy generated. It's a smart investment for a sustainable future. Learn

Unlock with Our Innovative Roof Rental Program

Lightpath Property Solutions offers a unique roof rental model, allowing commercial property owners to lease their unused roof space for solar panel installations. This provides a hassle-free way to generate passive income while contributing to a greener environment, all without any upfront investment. 0 % Increase in property value 0 % Hassle-free passive income
